extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won Stage 4 sprint after crash split peloton in final kilometers, beating BAUHAUS and EWAN in photo finish
tactical_patterns: Soudal Quick-Step radio ordered control of any dangerous move post-sprint, anticipating counter-attacks with 90km remaining after intermediate sprint.
PHILIPSEN Jasper's leadout survived peloton-splitting crash inside final 3km, suggesting Soudal Quick-Step positioning discipline under chaos conditions.
BAUHAUS Phil third consecutive podium (3rd, 2nd, 2nd) reveals consistent positioning skill but inability to time final acceleration against PHILIPSEN.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: Second consecutive sprint victory, 150 green jersey points, leadout executed perfectly despite late crash chaos
rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: neutral: Third straight podium finish but consistently loses photo finishes by 6 inches, positioning excellent but timing deficient
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: Second consecutive runner-up finish after three years without Tour win, regaining sprint form but marginally slower than PHILIPSEN
rider_signals.LAFAY Victor: neutral: Lost green jersey despite intermediate sprint defense attempt on Stage 3, tactical effort insufficient against PHILIPSEN's stage wins
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Fourth day in yellow with no GC attacks attempted, peloton content to preserve 6-second gap to POGAČAR
